title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on China as report suggests plans for arms shipment to Iran
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China, after a report on Sunday that Beijing was preparing a weapons shipment to Iran.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China, after a report on Sunday that Beijing was preparing a weapons shipment to Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: plans for arms shipment to Iran
